nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Warcop
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Warcop (Westmorland). The placename derives from Old Norse vartha ‘cairn or beacon’ + Old English copp ‘top of a hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

nameMeanings.name: Cumberland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Cumberland in northwestern England (now part of Cumbria). In Britain this name is most common in Nottinghamshire.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: Richard Cumberland de Warcop was born in 1219, in Warcop, Westmorland, England as the son of Alan de Warcop. He had at least 1 son. He died in 1282, in Warcop, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard Cumberland de Warcop est né en 1219, à Warcop, Westmorland, Angleterre, fils de Alan de Warcop. Il a eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1282, à Warcop, Westmorland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Richard Cumberland de Warcop wurde 1219 in Warcop, Westmorland, England, als Sohn von Alan de Warcop geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1282 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Warcop, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Richard Cumberland de Warcop è nato il nel 1219 nel Warcop, Westmorland, England come figlio di Alan de Warcop. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1282, nel Warcop, Westmorland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Cumberland de Warcopは1219年にイギリスウエストモーランドワーコップでAlan de Warcopの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1282年にイギリスイギリスウエストモーランドワーコップで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Cumberland de Warcop(은)는 1219년 영국 웨스트모를랜드 워코프에서 Alan de Warcop의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1282년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트모를랜드 워코프에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard Cumberland de Warcop nasceu em 1219, em Warcop, Westmorland, Inglaterra filho de Alan de Warcop. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1282, em Warcop, Westmorland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard Cumberland de Warcop родился в 1219 г. в местности варкоп, вестморланд, Англия. Его отца звали Alan de Warcop. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1282 г. в местности варкоп, вестморланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Richard Cumberland de Warcop nació en 1219, en Warcop, Westmorland, Inglaterra como hijo de Alan de Warcop. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1282, en Warcop, Westmorland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 63 años.
